text:
Codex 现在支持创建 Subagents

而且你还能切换窗口很便捷的跟踪每个Subagents 正在做的事情

 https://t.co/hbbnGvqLRA

Kimi 昨晚这篇论文很猛

尝试用 K2.5 对 Kimi 这篇论文进行可视化解释。 https://t.co/M6W3xpBKjx

Never been a better time to study the humanities:
1) LLMs are trained on the cultural history of all humans, knowing that helps you use them
2) The humanities gives us context in this odd moment in history
3) Books & stuff are good
Wrote this 3 years ago: https://t.co/7WrT6Jbhyw

4) The job market is going to change rapidly, general knowledge may be useful
5) And for those who are just interested in remaking the world, I would note that you can't be a philosopher king without knowing philosophy (and, no, a bunch of modern writings on Stoicism don't count)

Axiom: The form of AI that we ended up with is deeply weird in ways that we don't fully get. Attempts to pretend AI is less weird & apply it like a standard IT product will inevitably result in less useful & far less reliable AI implementations than those that embrace weirdness.
RT @icreatelife: The coolest use-case for AI animation I found of new Nano Banana 2 is that you can screenshot a map and ask it to generate…
RT @coreyganim: https://t.co/R60ja9pTKc
Wow

RT @lifesinger: 刚听完橘子和 Mars 录的这期播客。比那篇爆款文章好看很多。几个很值得创业者关注的大实话：

1. 不是 SaaS 已死、Agent 永生，而是 SaaS 已平、Agent 暴增。最好的创业机会，往往在人口增量上。人类 DAU 已饱和，agen…
RT @yan5xu: https://t.co/3276u89I8M

I get why AI labs are so focused on software development (it helps them get recursive improvement, and also they are coders so they think coding is the most vital thing), but there are 9.5x more managers than there are coders & efforts to build tools for them are very nascent.

Gemini as folklore machine: "Create a comic using universal folklore index ATU 570 set in the present day"

"Now add ATU 720" 

ATU 570 are tales about "the king's rabbit herder" & ATU 720 is "My mother slew me, my father ate me, my sister buried me under the juniper" (really) https://t.co/tXkmDYLc1Y

I suspect I am getting a bit obscure in my tests at this point, but it is cool that the AI can look up folklore numbers from this massive index of world folklore motifs and turn them into comics, making  the weird incoherent stuff built into folklore make some sort of sense. https://t.co/ozYyGXgpNB

Stumbled upon this woman on IG who used to braid hair for a living.

Now she makes these magical AI hair machine videos and gets infinitely more views. https://t.co/XsVt6dplm7

黄仁勋2小时都发布了什么

英伟达 GTC 2026 “AI春晚” 中文视频

（使用的是我的字幕翻译技能，完美对准时间线，在cc里一句话就能翻译2个小时的视频，从下载、转录到烧录只需说：翻译视频即可）

1万亿美元...

这是老黄今天在 GTC 2026 上给出的最炸裂数字

Blackwell 和 Vera Rubin 到 2027 https://t.co/x3HJhXciiW

视频太长不想开的

看图文版本 ：

https://t.co/WcsDYE9KUi https://t.co/KNMIf0wdj9

兄弟们 

M3 Max 有必要换 M5 Max吗

想换的❤很强烈

算了下要4w，劝劝我😅
你怎么理解世界，世界就怎么向你展开。

如果因资源所限（电力、显卡、内存等），阶段时间内模型输出的「智能」总量是有「上限」的，那么，Token Price 的走势会不会是：

- SOTA Token Price: 持平甚至涨价

再考虑到Wright's Law: 累积产量每翻一倍，单位成本下降一个固定百分比。 而当前阶段的Normal 智能Token进入了此规律：价格下降 →

paper: https://t.co/zb2ng9RFUC

「钱多，探索；钱少，集中。」

广度优先和深度优先的选择问题，被一个公式给统一了，有意思。 https://t.co/Andel2pWQ2

重度使用Agent的一个副作用是「沉浸其中不可自拔」，一晃好几个小时就过去了。

跟Agent说一句：「设定提醒：从我跟你说第一句话开始计时，一小时后，语音提醒我休息十分钟。下次对话开始时，重置计时。」

实践下来，它生成的提醒休息的脚本非常好用。

彼得·蒂尔讲述了PayPal的创立故事

“当你创办一家公司时，通常不会立刻就有一个完整的想法，”蒂尔开篇说道。

“上世纪90年代末，硅谷经历了一场令人难以置信的互联网热潮。感觉就像是一片开放的疆域，一场淘金热，而金融自然而然地成为了人们关注的焦点。”
